title: Our Channels
note: Some channels require default mode or specific roles to view.

groups.name: School Admin
groups.description: The essential channels for rules, updates, verification, enrollment, and private support.

channels.name: ✅・verify-here
channels.description: Verify to chat and join voice channels.

channels.name: 🔑・server-guide
channels.description: Guide to help members navigate the server.

channels.name: ❓・faqs
channels.description: Frequently asked questions in this server.

groups.name: Student Center
groups.description: Recognition, introductions, surveys, and broader student-facing spaces.

channels.name: 🏆・leaderboard
channels.description: Top weekly study buddies are posted here.

channels.name: 📋・class-rank
channels.description: Log of voice ranks and class levels earned.

channels.name: 👋🏼・introduce-yourself
channels.description: Say hi and share a bit about you.

channels.name: 🗳・suggestions
channels.description: Drop ideas to improve the server.

groups.name: Study Lounge
groups.description: General study-adjacent spaces surrounding the main silent study rooms.

channels.name: 📸・class-pictures
channels.description: Send pictures together with your study buddies.

channels.name: 🎧・study-music
channels.description: Interface for music while in SRs.

groups.name: Study On-Cam Rooms
groups.description: Supporting channels for the stricter on-cam study setup.

channels.name: ⚡・cam-alerts
channels.description: Alerts when a camera turns off while in an SOR.

channels.name: 💬・sor-chat
channels.description: General chat for those in an SOR.

groups.name: Custom Study Rooms
groups.description: Tools and rules for members using customizable study rooms.

channels.name: 🎧・csr-music
channels.description: Interface for music while in CSRs.

groups.name: Pomodoro Rooms
groups.description: Timed focus spaces and task-tracking support for pomodoro users.

channels.name: 🕛・pomo-1 / 🕑・pomo-2 / 🕒・pomo-3
channels.description: Pomodoro timers for those in pomo rooms.

channels.name: ☑️・pomodoro-tasks
channels.description: Make a to-do list while in a pomodoro room.

groups.name: Voice Study Rooms
groups.description: Collaborative study spaces where members can communicate.

channels.name: 🎧・vsr-music
channels.description: Interface for music while in VSRs.

groups.name: Productivity Tools
groups.description: Useful systems that support accountability, reminders, and study tracking.

channels.name: 🔴・study-mode
channels.description: Toggle between study and default mode.

channels.name: 🍪・cookie-zone
channels.description: Deposit your study hours here after joining a voice channel.

channels.name: 🌲・forest
channels.description: Plant and join sessions with study buddies.

groups.name: Library
groups.description: Utility channels and access to the StudyWithMe Digital Library.

channels.name: 🔤・dictionary
channels.description: Look up the meaning of words here.

channels.name: StudyWithMe Digital Library
channels.description: Available here for members who purchase a Library Card at 😻・mimu.

groups.name: External Affairs
groups.description: Channels for partnerships, creators, and outside-facing connections.

groups.name: School Grounds
groups.description: Academic spaces that depend on the academic roles a member has selected.

channels.name: Specific academic channels
channels.description: Available depending on your academic roles.

groups.name: Freedom Wall
groups.description: Wellness, journaling, reflection, celebration, and lighter community spaces.

channels.name: 💭・virtual-space
channels.description: Share interesting posts that can motivate others.

channels.name: 🎉・victory-bash
channels.description: Celebrate your wins, big or small.

channels.name: ⭐・starboard
channels.description: Posts with 20+ star reacts shine here.

channels.name: 🤪・emoji-war
channels.description: Spam channel for random cookie drops.

groups.name: Socials
groups.description: Social rooms and supporting spaces for bonding beyond academics.

channels.name: 🎧・soundtrip
channels.description: Interface for music while in Social Rooms.

channels.name: 💬・hallway
channels.description: General chat to bond beyond academics.

groups.name: Events Corner
groups.description: The event-facing corner for reminders, giveaways, and attendance.

channels.name: 🎟・rsvp
channels.description: Mark your attendance for future events.

groups.name: School Clubs
groups.description: Interest-based spaces for hobbies, friendships, and life beyond studying.

channels.name: Interest club channels
channels.description: Anime, art, asian-dramas, astrology, books, dance, films, food, health-and-wellness, games, kpop, manga, manhwa, music, pets, photography, poetry-and-prose, tech, and tv-series.

groups.name: Shopping Center
groups.description: Shopping-related spaces and future merch drops.

groups.name: Gym
groups.description: Fitness and wellness spaces for goals, routines, and challenges.

channels.name: 💪🏼・fitness-goals
channels.description: Share your goals, no matter how big or small.

channels.name: 🧘🏻・workout-routine
channels.description: Drop your routines and flex your consistency.

channels.name: 🍌・healthy-recipes
channels.description: Share healthy meals and snack hacks.

groups.name: Dormitory
groups.description: Bots, games, role purchases, and the AFK channel.

channels.name: 😻・mimu
channels.description: Access Mimu commands and buy roles here.

channels.name: 😴・AFK
